page_content:
Prerequisite: Admissions test for second year courses; and permission of ARHU-Communication department.

Repeatable to: 8 credits if content differs.

COMM730 Seminar in Health Communication (3 Credits) Communication processes in health care and promotion. Formerly: SPCH730.

COMM738 Seminar in Mediated Communication (3-12 Credits) The examination of special topics related to the study of mediated communication.
